title: Extra Wide White Rubber Door Wedge (5 cm) 1 Piece - Durable, Ideal Stopper for Home or Office Use
features: SLEEK & SUBTLE AESTHETIC: The white color of this door wedge adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to any room. The sleek and subtle design seamlessly blends into any décor, without drawing attention to itself.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from durable rubber, this door wedge is designed to withstand the daily wear and tear of home or office use.
EASE OF USE: Designed with practicality in mind, this door wedge easily slides under doors without the need for bending or stooping.

VERSAILE APPLICATION: This door wedge is suitable for a variety of applications, whether you want to keep your office door open and welcoming or ensure privacy in your home, this door wedge can easily accommodate your needs.
OPTIMAL SIZE FOR STABILITY: The 5 cm width of this door wedge is designed to provide maximum stability and support, making it suitable for a wide range of door sizes and weights.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: A premium quality door wedge is designed with a rectangular shape in white rubber and a height of 5cm and is suitable for a wide range of doors. Safety Warning No warning applicable
